204.description: Reset email sent if account exists

422.description: Asset not supported or insufficient balance

parameters.name: levels
parameters.description: Number of price levels to return (default: 20)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by order status. Accepts a single value or comma-separated list e.g: `open` or `open,partially_filled`. Values: open, filled, cancelled, partially_filled

parameters.name: pair
parameters.description: Filter by trading pair e.g BTC/USDT

403.description: Order does not belong to user

404.description: No trades found for this pair

parameters.name: pair
parameters.description: Filter by trading pair e.g BTC/USDT

401.description: Not authenticated or incorrect current password

tags.name: Market Data
tags.description: Public market data — order book, trades, ticker, pairs

tags.name: WebSocket
tags.description:
Connect to ws://localhost:3000/ws to receive real-time events.

        **Channels:**
        - `orderbook:{symbol}` — live order book updates e.g `orderbook:BTC/USDT`
        - `trades:{symbol}` — live trade feed e.g `trades:BTC/USDT`  
        - `ticker:{symbol}` — 24h ticker updates e.g `ticker:BTC/USDT`
        - `orders:{user_id}` — private order status updates (requires auth)

        **Subscribe:**
        ```json
        { "action": "subscribe", "channel": "orderbook:BTC/USDT" }
        ```

        **Authenticate (for private channels):**
        ```json
        { "action": "auth", "token": "your-jwt-token" }
        ```
